requirement_topic.en: Chile SEC Product Certification and Protocol Scope
requirement_topic.zh: 智利SEC产品认证与协议适用范围
requirement_topic.zht: 智利SEC產品認證與協議適用範圍

summary.en: Chile's Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles (SEC) operates the electrical-product safety oversight and SEC seal route for products within published protocol scope. For EV chargers, exporters should confirm whether the specific AC wallbox, portable EVSE, DC charger, cable assembly, plug, socket-outlet, or accessory is covered by a current SEC protocol before claiming mandatory product certification.
summary.zh: 智利电力与燃料监管局（SEC）负责适用产品的电气产品安全监管和SEC标识路径。对于电动汽车充电设备，出口商应先确认具体交流壁挂桩、便携式EVSE、直流充电机、电缆组件、插头、插座或附件是否落入现行SEC协议范围，再主张强制产品认证。
summary.zht: 智利電力與燃料監管局（SEC）負責適用產品的電氣產品安全監管和SEC標識路徑。對於電動汽車充電設備，出口商應先確認具體交流壁掛樁、便攜式EVSE、直流充電機、電纜組件、插頭、插座或附件是否落入現行SEC協議範圍，再主張強制產品認證。

standards_or_laws: SEC product certification protocols and SEC seal rules for electrical products in scope

summary.en: China EV charger files commonly include GB/T 18487 and GB/T 20234 test reports plus CCC or CQC materials where applicable. These can support technical review but do not prove that the product is inside or outside Chile SEC protocol scope.
summary.zh: 中国充电桩资料通常包括GB/T 18487、GB/T 20234测试报告，以及适用时的CCC或CQC材料。这些资料可支持技术审查，但不能证明产品是否落入智利SEC协议范围。
summary.zht: 中國充電樁資料通常包括GB/T 18487、GB/T 20234測試報告，以及適用時的CCC或CQC材料。這些資料可支持技術審查，但不能證明產品是否落入智利SEC協議範圍。

gap.en: The first gap is a Chile scope determination, not a standard-to-standard test comparison. Prepare model identifiers, ratings, wiring diagrams, connector configuration, intended use, installation method, manuals, labels, and existing GB/T reports for a Chile certification body or SEC-scope review.
gap.zh: 首要差距是智利适用范围判定，而不是标准条文逐项比对。应准备型号、额定参数、接线图、接口配置、用途、安装方式、说明书、标签和既有GB/T报告，供智利认证机构或SEC范围审查。
gap.zht: 首要差距是智利適用範圍判定，而不是標準條文逐項比對。應準備型號、額定參數、接線圖、接口配置、用途、安裝方式、說明書、標籤和既有GB/T報告，供智利認證機構或SEC範圍審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory only where the specific EV charger, accessory, or electrical product is covered by a current Chile SEC certification protocol; otherwise scope must be confirmed before claiming mandatory certification
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or voluntary depending on the Chinese product category, certification catalogue, and buyer or project requirements

source.publisher: Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles (SEC), Chile

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not overclaim whole-unit mandatory SEC certification for every EV charger. Start with SEC protocol scope, then map the charger, cable, connector, and accessory set to any applicable Chile certification route.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应笼统宣称所有整机充电桩均强制SEC认证。应先确认SEC协议范围，再将充电机、电缆、接口和附件组合映射到适用的智利认证路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應籠統宣稱所有整機充電樁均強制SEC認證。應先確認SEC協議範圍，再將充電機、電纜、接口和附件組合映射到適用的智利認證路徑。
